name: test_should_datetime_into_date_time[localdatetime({year: 1984, week: 10, dayOfWeek: 3, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, millisecond: 645})-{datetime: other, day: 28, second: 42}-'1984-03-28T12:31:42.645Z']

parameters.name: _pytest_bdd_example
parameters.value: {'other': 'localdatetime({year: 1984, week: 10, dayOfWeek: 3, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, millisecond: 645})', 'expression': '{datetime: other, day: 28, second: 42}', 'result': "'1984-03-28T12:31:42.645Z'"}
